div.div:
UCLB Demo
R4-R5: 25 Mbps (E0/1)
R4-R6: 50 Mbps (E0/2)
R5-R6: 5 Mbps (E0/1)
Tune variance on R4 to enable

div.div:
Summarization
R1 E0/0: 101.1.4.0/22 (Lo8-Lo11)
R4 E0/0: 101.1.8.0/22 (Lo3-Lo6)
R5 / R6: auto-summary (classful)
